headline: Travelers Earnings Beat Estimates. Why the Stock Is Dropping Despite a Dividend Increase.
summary: Shares of  Travelers  fell Thursday after the property and casualty insurer reported mixed quarterly earnings and raised its dividend.  The company posted adjusted earnings of $7.71 a share for the first quarter, surpassing analysts’ consensus estimates of $7.07, according to FactSet.  Travelers stock fell 1.7% in the premarket session.

raw.headline: Travelers Earnings Beat Estimates. Why the Stock Is Dropping Despite a Dividend Increase.

The company posted adjusted earnings of $7.71 a share for the first quarter, surpassing analysts’ consensus estimates of $7.07, according to FactSet.  Travelers stock fell 1.7% in the premarket session.

headline: Travelers (NYSE:TRV) Misses Q1 CY2026 Sales Expectations
summary: Property and casualty insurer Travelers (NYSE:TRV) missed Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales flat year on year at $11.92 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $7.71 per share was 8.9% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Travelers Reports Excellent First Quarter Results
summary: NEW YORK, April 16, 2026--The Travelers Companies, Inc. today reported net income of $1.711 billion, or $7.78 per diluted share, for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, compared to $395 million, or $1.70 per diluted share, in the prior year quarter. Core income in the current quarter was $1.696 billion, or $7.71 per diluted share, compared to $443 million, or $1.91 per diluted share, in the prior year quarter. headline: Will S&P 500 Open Up Or Down On April 16?
summary: The S&P 500 rose 0.8% on Wednesday to close at a record 7,022.95, extending its recent rally as investors continued to bet that the U.S.-Iran war may soon draw to a close.
